headline: Sempra Infrastructure's ECA LNG Phase 1 Exports First LNG Cargo from Mexico's Pacific Coast
summary: Sempra Infrastructure, a subsidiary of Sempra (NYSE: SRE), today announced that the ECA LNG Phase 1 project in Ensenada, Mexico, has safely and successfully loaded and shipped its first cargo of liquefied natural gas (LNG), an important milestone toward full commercial operations.
